item.title: Android Mobile Bulk SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Android Mobile Bulk SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: sendbulksms
item.itunes:summary:
Android Mobile Bulk SMS Software
(Chat & Messenging)
GUI based Android Mobile Bulk SMS Software provides best solution for increasing business sale, mobile marketing etc by sending unlimited text messages to many mobile users. Professional text sms sender application helps users to forward bulk text notification, alerts, messages, reminder etc from android technology based mobile phone within few minutes. Expert text sms sender application supports various text formats like txt, html, xls etc to compose customized text messages.

[read more]
item.description:
Android Mobile Bulk SMS Software
(Chat & Messenging)
GUI based Android Mobile Bulk SMS Software provides best solution for increasing business sale, mobile marketing etc by sending unlimited text messages to many mobile users. Professional text sms sender application helps users to forward bulk text notification, alerts, messages, reminder etc from android technology based mobile phone within few minutes. Expert text sms sender application supports various text formats like txt, html, xls etc to compose customized text messages.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Android Mobile Bulk SMS Software
(Chat & Messenging)
GUI based Android Mobile Bulk SMS Software provides best solution for increasing business sale, mobile marketing etc by sending unlimited text messages to many mobile users. Professional text sms sender application helps users to forward bulk text notification, alerts, messages, reminder etc from android technology based mobile phone within few minutes. Expert text sms sender application supports various text formats like txt, html, xls etc to compose customized text messages.

[read more]

item.title: Restore Deleted Files Fat Partition [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Restore Deleted Files Fat Partition [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restoredeleted
item.itunes:summary:
Restore Deleted Files Fat Partition
(Utilities)
Looking for video rescue tool to regain formatted clip from disk drive? Not get appropriate solution! Don't tensed just visit www.restoredeletedfiles.org site that offers Restore Deleted Files Fat Partition software to revive missed document, file, folder, images from FAT16, FAT32 based partitioned hard disk. FAT pics rescue utility having user interactive graphical interface and having capability to retrieve missed data from device even “drive not detected” error message display on computer screen.

[read more]

FAT pics rescue utility having user interactive graphical interface and having capability to retrieve missed data from device even “drive not detected” error message display on computer screen.

[read more]

item.title: Windows 11 Menu [Windong] [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Windows 11 Menu [Windong] [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: ngupiware
item.itunes:summary:
Windows 11 Menu [Windong]
(Graphic Apps)
New Windong 11 start menu is a start menu similar to windows 11 start menu for linux.
1. easy to add menu to favorite menu
2. Fast Menu
3. Auto detect Installed / removed Apps
4. Auto Detect Icons
5. Responsive
6. Light


HOW TO INSTALL (Watch Video On Top )
1. Open Terminal and type : Bash install.sh
2. Add Windong11-Button to Panel

[read more]

item.title: Digital Photos Restore Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Photos Restore Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restoredeleted
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Photos Restore Software
(Utilities)
Company suggests you to download Digital Photos Restore Software on Windows PC at an affordable price that consists of advance techniques used to get back every single picture, images, photo from mass storage drive in simplest manner. Photo recovery program is compatible to any kind of mass storage drive for proper salvage of damaged files, folders in simplest manner without any need of programming skills to apply.

[read more]

Company suggests you to download Digital Photos Restore Software on Windows PC at an affordable price that consists of advance techniques used to get back every single picture, images, photo from mass storage drive in simplest manner. Photo recovery program is compatible to any kind of mass storage drive for proper salvage of damaged files, folders in simplest manner without any need of programming skills to apply.

item.title: digiKam [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: digiKam [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: digikamdeveloper
item.itunes:summary:
digiKam
(Graphic Apps)
digiKam is an advanced digital [b]photo management application[/b], which makes importing and organizing digital photos a "snap". The photos can be organized in albums which can be sorted chronologically, by directory layout or by custom collections.
Tired of the directory constraints? Don’t worry, digiKam also provides [b]tagging functionality[/b]. You tag your images which can be spread out across multiple folders and digiKam provides fast and intuitive ways to browse these tagged images. You can also add [b]comments and rating[/b] to your images. digiKam makes use of a fast and robust database to store these meta-informations which makes adding and editing of comments and tags very reliable.

An easy to use interface is provided that enables you to [b]connect to your camera[/b] and preview, download and/or delete your images. digiKam includes too an image editor for image corrections and manipulations.

Another tool, which most artists and photographers will be familiar with, is a [b]Light Table[/b]. This tool assists artists and photographers with reviewing their work ensuring only the highest quality. A light table will show the artist their imperfections in which they can go and touch up. Well in digiKam, the light table function provides the user a similar experience. You can import a photo, drag it onto the light table, and touch up only the areas that need it.

The digiKam [b]Image Editor[/b] come with some common tools e.g. red eye correction or colors correction. Additional tools are provided with the main application to process advanced corrections on image like color management, noise reduction, or special effects. digiKam Image Editor support all camera RAW file formats, 16 bits color depth, Exif/Makernote/IPTC/GPS metadata, Color management, tagging/rating/comments pictures, etc.

A lots of search tools are also available to be able to find specific photo on whole collection : [b]Time line[/b], Calendar, Advanced Search using multiple and complex database queries (tags, rating, keywords, date, location, camera, shot settings, etc.)

A stand-alone image editor version named [b]Showfoto[/b] is also available. It runs without digiKam images database support, but provides all Image Editor tools.

See the related project page for more information:

[url]http://www.digikam.org[/url]

Online documentations:

[url]http://docs.kde.org/development/en/extragear-graphics/digikam/index.html[/url]
[url]http://docs.kde.org/development/en/extragear-graphics/showfoto/index.html[/url]

NOTE:

- Please, use the digiKam mailing-list for all comments:

[b]digikam-users at kde dot org[/b]

- Please, use Bug Tracking System for wishes and reports:
[url]http://bugs.kde.org/buglist.cgi?product=digikam[/url]

You can contact developers on Freenode IRC channels:

[b]#digikam[/b]

or using the developers mailing-list :

[b]digikam-devel at kde dot org[/b]

To help digiKam project, you can [u]donate money to developers[/u]. Take a look at this page for details:

[url]http://www.digikam.org/donation[/url]
[read more]
item.description:
digiKam
(Graphic Apps)
digiKam is an advanced digital [b]photo management application[/b], which makes importing and organizing digital photos a "snap". The photos can be organized in albums which can be sorted chronologically, by directory layout or by custom collections.
Tired of the directory constraints? Don’t worry, digiKam also provides [b]tagging functionality[/b]. You tag your images which can be spread out across multiple folders and digiKam provides fast and intuitive ways to browse these tagged images. You can also add [b]comments and rating[/b] to your images. digiKam makes use of a fast and robust database to store these meta-informations which makes adding and editing of comments and tags very reliable.

An easy to use interface is provided that enables you to [b]connect to your camera[/b] and preview, download and/or delete your images. digiKam includes too an image editor for image corrections and manipulations.

Another tool, which most artists and photographers will be familiar with, is a [b]Light Table[/b]. This tool assists artists and photographers with reviewing their work ensuring only the highest quality. A light table will show the artist their imperfections in which they can go and touch up. Well in digiKam, the light table function provides the user a similar experience. You can import a photo, drag it onto the light table, and touch up only the areas that need it.

The digiKam [b]Image Editor[/b] come with some common tools e.g. red eye correction or colors correction. Additional tools are provided with the main application to process advanced corrections on image like color management, noise reduction, or special effects. digiKam Image Editor support all camera RAW file formats, 16 bits color depth, Exif/Makernote/IPTC/GPS metadata, Color management, tagging/rating/comments pictures, etc.

A lots of search tools are also available to be able to find specific photo on whole collection : [b]Time line[/b], Calendar, Advanced Search using multiple and complex database queries (tags, rating, keywords, date, location, camera, shot settings, etc.)

A stand-alone image editor version named [b]Showfoto[/b] is also available. It runs without digiKam images database support, but provides all Image Editor tools.

See the related project page for more information:

[url]http://www.digikam.org[/url]

Online documentations:

[url]http://docs.kde.org/development/en/extragear-graphics/digikam/index.html[/url]
[url]http://docs.kde.org/development/en/extragear-graphics/showfoto/index.html[/url]

NOTE:

- Please, use the digiKam mailing-list for all comments:

[b]digikam-users at kde dot org[/b]

- Please, use Bug Tracking System for wishes and reports:
[url]http://bugs.kde.org/buglist.cgi?product=digikam[/url]

You can contact developers on Freenode IRC channels:

[b]#digikam[/b]

or using the developers mailing-list :

[b]digikam-devel at kde dot org[/b]

To help digiKam project, you can [u]donate money to developers[/u]. Take a look at this page for details:

[url]http://www.digikam.org/donation[/url]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
digiKam
(Graphic Apps)
digiKam is an advanced digital [b]photo management application[/b], which makes importing and organizing digital photos a "snap". The photos can be organized in albums which can be sorted chronologically, by directory layout or by custom collections.
Tired of the directory constraints? Don’t worry, digiKam also provides [b]tagging functionality[/b]. You tag your images which can be spread out across multiple folders and digiKam provides fast and intuitive ways to browse these tagged images. You can also add [b]comments and rating[/b] to your images. digiKam makes use of a fast and robust database to store these meta-informations which makes adding and editing of comments and tags very reliable.

An easy to use interface is provided that enables you to [b]connect to your camera[/b] and preview, download and/or delete your images. digiKam includes too an image editor for image corrections and manipulations.

Another tool, which most artists and photographers will be familiar with, is a [b]Light Table[/b]. This tool assists artists and photographers with reviewing their work ensuring only the highest quality. A light table will show the artist their imperfections in which they can go and touch up. Well in digiKam, the light table function provides the user a similar experience. You can import a photo, drag it onto the light table, and touch up only the areas that need it.

The digiKam [b]Image Editor[/b] come with some common tools e.g. red eye correction or colors correction. Additional tools are provided with the main application to process advanced corrections on image like color management, noise reduction, or special effects. digiKam Image Editor support all camera RAW file formats, 16 bits color depth, Exif/Makernote/IPTC/GPS metadata, Color management, tagging/rating/comments pictures, etc.

A lots of search tools are also available to be able to find specific photo on whole collection : [b]Time line[/b], Calendar, Advanced Search using multiple and complex database queries (tags, rating, keywords, date, location, camera, shot settings, etc.)

A stand-alone image editor version named [b]Showfoto[/b] is also available. It runs without digiKam images database support, but provides all Image Editor tools.

See the related project page for more information:

[url]http://www.digikam.org[/url]

Online documentations:

[url]http://docs.kde.org/development/en/extragear-graphics/digikam/index.html[/url]
[url]http://docs.kde.org/development/en/extragear-graphics/showfoto/index.html[/url]

NOTE:

- Please, use the digiKam mailing-list for all comments:

[b]digikam-users at kde dot org[/b]

[url]http://bugs.kde.org/buglist.cgi?product=digikam[/url]

[b]#digikam[/b]

or using the developers mailing-list :

[b]digikam-devel at kde dot org[/b]

To help digiKam project, you can [u]donate money to developers[/u]. Take a look at this page for details:

[url]http://www.digikam.org/donation[/url]
[read more]

item.title: Send Bulk SMS Android Mobile [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Send Bulk SMS Android Mobile [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: sendbulksms
item.itunes:summary:
Send Bulk SMS Android Mobile
(Chat & Messenging)
Want to deliver text messages to your friends, business partners and other important contacts? Visit company website www.sendbulksms.org to download excellent features of Send Bulk SMS Android Mobile phone software. Stunning PC to mobile sms forwarding application is fully compatible with all major Android phones to send unicode language supported text messages with delay delivery option to control the load of bulk SMS broadcasting. Comprehensive message sending program eliminates duplicate contact numbers while transferring multiple sms from PC to mobiles connected with Android Technology cell phone devices.

[read more]

item.title: Professional Send Bulk SMS [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Professional Send Bulk SMS [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: sendbulksms
item.itunes:summary:
Professional Send Bulk SMS
(Chat & Messenging)
Looking for cost effective text messaging utility? Download Send Bulk SMS Software from www.sendbulksms.org which is easiest and quickest way to keep in touch with your friends, co-workers, business clients, relatives and family members to send personalized text messages, funny jokes and seasonal greetings on their cell phone from pc connected via with GSM mobile device without requiring any internet gateway. PC to mobile text messaging software is designed using delay delivery feature to maintain load of bulk SMS broadcasting.

[read more]

Looking for cost effective text messaging utility? Download Send Bulk SMS Software from www.sendbulksms.org which is easiest and quickest way to keep in touch with your friends, co-workers, business clients, relatives and family members to send personalized text messages, funny jokes and seasonal greetings on their cell phone from pc connected via with GSM mobile device without requiring any internet gateway. PC to mobile text messaging software is designed using delay delivery feature to maintain load of bulk SMS broadcasting.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Professional Send Bulk SMS
(Chat & Messenging)
Looking for cost effective text messaging utility? Download Send Bulk SMS Software from www.sendbulksms.org which is easiest and quickest way to keep in touch with your friends, co-workers, business clients, relatives and family members to send personalized text messages, funny jokes and seasonal greetings on their cell phone from pc connected via with GSM mobile device without requiring any internet gateway. PC to mobile text messaging software is designed using delay delivery feature to maintain load of bulk SMS broadcasting.

[read more]

item.title: Converseen [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Converseen [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: faster
item.itunes:summary:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Windows[b], Linux, macOS, FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert, resize, rotate, and flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF document into a set of images[/b] with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+ formats[/b], set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for free!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Carry out a single or a multiple conversion.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a bunch of images
- Extract an image from a Windows icon file (*ico)

If you appreciate this work and would like to support the project, you are welcome to donate money via Paypal: [url]https://www.paypal.com/cgi-bin/webscr?cmd=_s-xclick&hosted_button_id=HQA6TBT5354FC[/url]

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]
item.description:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Windows[b], Linux, macOS, FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert, resize, rotate, and flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF document into a set of images[/b] with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+ formats[/b], set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for free!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Carry out a single or a multiple conversion.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a bunch of images
- Extract an image from a Windows icon file (*ico)

If you appreciate this work and would like to support the project, you are welcome to donate money via Paypal: [url]https://www.paypal.com/cgi-bin/webscr?cmd=_s-xclick&hosted_button_id=HQA6TBT5354FC[/url]

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Windows[b], Linux, macOS, FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert, resize, rotate, and flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF document into a set of images[/b] with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+ formats[/b], set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for free!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Carry out a single or a multiple conversion.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a bunch of images
- Extract an image from a Windows icon file (*ico)

If you appreciate this work and would like to support the project, you are welcome to donate money via Paypal: [url]https://www.paypal.com/cgi-bin/webscr?cmd=_s-xclick&hosted_button_id=HQA6TBT5354FC[/url]

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:

[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]

[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

item.title: Restore Memory Card Files Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Restore Memory Card Files Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restoredeleted
item.itunes:summary:
Restore Memory Card Files Software
(Utilities)
Restore Memory Card Files Software restore removed files from compact flash memory card in just few clicks of mouse with advanced GUI interface so that user can easily operate software without acquiring any special skill. Micro SD cards folders recovery application regains missing files from SD card even if "Drive Not Formatted" error message is displayed while accessing portable memory card on desktop and laptop PC.

[read more]
item.description:
Restore Memory Card Files Software

[read more]

Micro SD cards folders recovery application regains missing files from SD card even if "Drive Not Formatted" error message is displayed while accessing portable memory card on desktop and laptop PC.

[read more]
